calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Arnold W. Evje, II appeared for plaintiffs Jack K. Chong, Co-Trustee of the Jack K. Chong and Shirley S.M. Chong Living Trust dated June 24, 1991.
Dolores Chong, a witness for plaintiffs, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jorge Marrufo Torres, sued as Jorge Marrufo.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on August 21, 2009.
Amended Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed by plaintiffs today, October 5, 2009.
Settlement was reached between plaintiffs and defendant Mauricio Fiero on September 2, 2009.

Exhibit 1--Three-Day Notice to Quit (Nuisance) Undated-------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2--SFPD Incident Report dated 4/20/09----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3--SFPD Incident Report dated 6/9/09-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Jack K. Chong, Co-Trustee of the Jack K. Chong and Shirley S.M. Chong Living Trust dated June 24, 1991, and against defendant Jorge Marrufo Torres, sued as Jorge Marrufo, as follows:

Holdover Damages - $1,807.80.
Costs - $1,120.00.
Total - $2,927.80.

Additionally, plaintiffs Jack K. Chong, Co-Trustee of the Jack K. Chong and Shirley S.M. Chong Living Trust dated June 24, 1991 are entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 287 Bartlett Street, San Francisco, CA 94110. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Continued To Oct-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis; Clerk: V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Jack J. Chong is present.
Attorney, Dolores Chong, Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

Defendant Mauricio Marrufo is present.
Attorney, Richard McPalmer, Esq., representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The case did not settle. The trial date SEP-08-2009 remains set.
